title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: ledmon bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for ledmon is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The ledmon and ledctl utilities are user-space applications designed to control LEDs associated with each slot in an enclosure or a drive bay. There are two types of systems: 2-LED system (Activity LED, Status LED) and 3-LED system (Activity LED, Locate LED, Fail LED). Users must have root privileges to use this application.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): RHEL10 ledctl locate_off command error due to ledmon code bug on version 1.1.0  [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-95784)

full_text:
An update for ledmon is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The ledmon and ledctl utilities are user-space applications designed to control LEDs associated with each slot in an enclosure or a drive bay. There are two types of systems: 2-LED system (Activity LED, Status LED) and 3-LED system (Activity LED, Locate LED, Fail LED). Users must have root privileges to use this application.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): RHEL10 ledctl locate_off command error due to ledmon code bug on version 1.1.0  [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-95784)
